# io.source_kind { #tspaint.io.source_kind }

```python
tspaint.io.source_kind(source)
```

Classify a front-end ``source`` as ``"ts"``, ``"zarr"`` or ``"vcf"``.

A :class:`tskit.TreeSequence` is ``"ts"``; a path ending ``.vcf`` / ``.vcf.gz`` / ``.vcf.bgz``
(case-insensitively) is ``"vcf"``; anything else path-like (a ``.zarr`` store / directory /
mapping) is ``"zarr"``.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**source**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [tskit.TreeSequence, str, or zarr store / mapping]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   The front-end genotype source to classify.

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Exactly one of ``"ts"`` (a :class:`tskit.TreeSequence`), ``"vcf"`` (a VCF path), or ``"zarr"`` (any other path-like source, read by :func:`variants_from_zarr`).
